How SecureLayer Works

Product Walkthrough
1

Instant Agent Visibility

Connect your RMM and get a live dashboard of every AI agent across all client tenants — status, risk level, activity, and blocked events — in under 15 minutes.

  • Multi-tenant MSSP view with per-client drill-down
  • Real-time event stream with MITRE ATT&CK mapping
  • Risk scorecard per tenant for QBR presentations
2

Office Hours Enforcement

Set working hours per tenant and block all AI agent activity outside those windows. The fastest security win you can deliver — no code changes, no agent updates.

  • Per-timezone schedule with day-of-week granularity
  • Instant PSA alert on any out-of-hours attempt
  • Override PIN for emergency after-hours access
3

Skill Risk Scoring

Every AI skill is scored across 10 security dimensions — credential access, network reach, file system scope, prompt injection surface, and more. Auto-approve safe skills; block risky ones.

  • 10-dimension score per skill (0–10 composite)
  • Configurable auto-approve threshold per tenant
  • Rule flags mapped to MITRE techniques
4

One-Click PSA Ticketing

Every security event auto-creates a ticket in ConnectWise, Autotask, or HaloPSA — with severity, affected agent, tenant, and recommended action pre-filled. Your helpdesk never misses an AI incident.

  • ConnectWise Manage, Autotask, HaloPSA supported
  • SIEM push to Splunk, Sentinel, SumoLogic
  • HMAC webhook for custom integrations

Deploy in 15 Minutes

No agents to install on endpoints. Connects via your existing RMM and PSA.

⇄

Connect PSA / RMM

Paste your API key from ConnectWise, NinjaOne, or Datto.

→
◷

Set Office Hours

Define allowed windows per tenant. Enforcement is immediate.

→

Your first risk scorecard is ready for your next QBR call.

Built for MSSP Economics

Per-Tenant SaaS Pricing

$20–30/tenant/month. Add SecureLayer as a line item on every client invoice — the risk scorecard justifies the cost at every QBR.

Zero Endpoint Agents

Discovery and enforcement run through your existing RMM and PSA — no new software deployed to client machines, no change management.

Instant Compliance Narrative

AI agent access controls satisfy emerging SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001, and CMMC 2.0 clauses — a new upsell for compliance-driven clients.

White-Label Ready

Ship under your own brand. Clients see your logo, your reports, your portal — SecureLayer is your engine, invisibly.
